cards.back: A flexible approach to software development that emphasizes collaboration, iterative progress, and continuous improvement to enhance software quality.
A software development technique that involves writing automated tests before writing the actual code, to ensure the code is testable and meets requirements.
A process where a developer reviews the code written by another developer to ensure it meets quality standards, follows coding conventions, and is maintainable.
An approach to software development that involves integrating code changes frequently, automatically testing the code, and providing immediate feedback to developers.
A collaborative programming technique where two developers work together on the same code, to share knowledge, reduce errors, and improve code quality.
